failure_signature: + c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test") | WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY col_5410, col_5411, col_5412, col_5413, col_5414, col_5415, col_5416, col_5417, col_5418, col_5419) (executor/partition_table_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes incorrect KVRange construction for partition tables (a correctness bug) and updates/extends related tests. The `c.Skip(...)` line in the patch is not a targeted stabilization fix for a flaky failure signature, so CI logs/repro are needed to determine whether any flakiness existed and why.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: + c.Skip("exhaustive types test, skip race test") | WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY col_5410, col_5411, col_5412, col_5413, col_5414, col_5415, col_5416, col_5417, col_5418, col_5419) (executor/partition_table_test.go)
